title: Cocos Playable Typecheck Configuration
description: Configuration for plbx-cocos-typecheck — a read-only TypeScript typecheck helper for Cocos Creator playable projects.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Only version 1 is supported.

path.description: Explicit path to Cocos Creator app/installation.

expectedVersion.description: Expected Creator version. Helper fails if it doesn't match.

typescript.description: TypeScript source. Only 'bundled' (from Creator installation) is supported in v1.

ccDeclarationPath.description: Override path to cc.d.ts. Must declare module 'cc'.

extraTypeFiles.description: Additional .d.ts files inside project root to include in typecheck.

root.description: Project root relative to --project. Must stay inside project root.

sourceRoots.description: Directories to search for production TypeScript files.

include.description: Glob patterns for files to include.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for files to exclude.

followSymlinks.description: If true, follow symlinks during source discovery. Default false for safety.

readRootCompilerOptions.description: If true, read allowed compilerOptions from tsconfig.json (without following extends).

options.description: Compiler options. noEmit:true is forced and cannot be overridden.
